input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.2
            TITLE: accumulator inspection

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.2: Accumulator Inspection
IN.4.2 Accumulator Inspection 
The Accumulator(s) and associated equipment (Hand Cart, Chargers, etc) may be inspected 
during Electrical Technical Inspection, or separately from the rest of Electrical Technical 
Inspection.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 111 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: The Accumulator(s) and associated equipment (Hand Cart, Chargers, etc) may be inspected during Electrical Technical Inspection, or separately from the rest of Electrical Technical Inspection.
